title: Core Components of an Expert System
description: A flowchart illustrating the architecture and flow of information in a rule-based expert system, showing how user input is processed to generate a conclusion or recommendation.
relationships: User provides input to the User Interface
Inference Engine matches input from Working Memory against rules in the Knowledge Base
Inference Engine updates Working Memory with new facts and arrives at a Conclusion
Explanation Facility justifies the conclusion by tracing the rules used
